message:
test: add direct tests for readColumnValue, sliceColumnarBatch, columnarKWayMerge

These functions are now public API exports but had zero direct test
coverage (only tested indirectly via merge.test.ts). Adds 17 tests:
- readColumnValue: f64, i64, i32, string, bool single-element reads
- sliceColumnarBatch: offset, offset+limit, string/bool slicing, edge cases
- columnarKWayMerge: asc/desc merge, limit, multi-column, 3-way, empty batches
